text.message: good luck blocking him, your problem now
you didn't even need the brick holy cow
my best settle was 5 wood and go for it
don't be sorry, you played everyone else so well. I didn't think anyone would be stupid enough to trade you the sheep
that's fair, you didn't play them. I'm just fascinated to hear more of why green wanted you in a such a strong position
theres a reason no one blocked him
Maybe you're onto something green, even a blind squirrel finds a nut sometimes
its tough being blind, be nice
eh I don't have any finishing cards
just had to slow y'all down
you didn't need to give up on turn 0 blue
when you got plowed everyone was still in a good position but you gave up
please tell me you are trolling me by trying to say I have given up haha
not me sitting here trying to build a city with rocks that got monopolies and bricks that were blocked and then sheep that were blocked
And who but you who blocked everything I need to get my settlement....
I am not giving up, on the contrary you have completely stifled my game lol
had to stop you from deving because you were only ever going to rob me
have rolled zero wheat all game
for some reason you are playing this game more vengeful than me
and either black or red is going to win because of it
it is likely red wins because I have to protect myself from you yes
I will Venmo you $1000 if you win over black or red
holy shitttt you have played 3200 games and still do not understand catan
shouldn't have thrown a trantrum from a turn 1 trade
I was upset and do not think I said anything overly mean or crazy. You made a poor trade and gave yourself much more competition
then completely through the game away
I hope to never meet you again
hey man, everyone having a good time here but you
Yes, as they have not been robbed or blocked all game :)
I would encourage everyone to report green for king making. Report me for griefing if you feel it has been too much, but goodness literally robbing away a game is wild
any brick out there for extend?
who cares if red or black wins
you already played god enough this game
the win was traded years ago
that comment is so hypocritical lmao
I think all 3of us have a chance
